title: Melchiora mannii
taxonomy: Melchiora mannii is a species of flowering plant in the family Rafflesiaceae. This family is a group of parasitic plants that are native to Southeast Asia. Rafflesiaceae is often referred to as the 'corpse lily family' due to their unique, pungent flowers. The order of Melchiora mannii is Capparales and the class is Magnoliopsida, both of which indicate that it is a flowering plant. Rafflesiaceae is a small family with only about 10-20 species of plants.
